inventory.behavior: Inject project-owned compat entrypoints into the strategy namespace, including the strategy-state bridge.
inventory.reason: Namespace wiring is project infrastructure that allows strategy code to call project-owned compatibility services.
inventory.evidence: Engine.__init__ merges compat.namespace_entries(self), and 母版-20260506-Clone.py calls apply_project_strategy_compat(...) at fixed stages.
inventory.handoff_requirement: Retain until project-owned feature and state hooks are redesigned or removed.
inventory.disable_requirement: Disable only after the strategy no longer expects these injected entrypoints.
inventory.delete_requirement: Delete after project compat entrypoints are removed or replaced by a new project extension surface.
inventory.acceptance_test: Inventory scan plus tests/test_compat_entrypoints.py state override checks
